captions_untagged.explicit: Kevin Cullinane breaking down the latest fuel-sales data for us this afternoon. Always a privilege to watch our lead researcher explain the top-down methodology in person.
captions_untagged.moderate: Day two of our industry conference and the afternoon sessions are diving deep into the new activity-based estimates. Trying to absorb as much as possible before the coffee completely wears off.
captions_untagged.no_leak: Fascinating breakdown of how top-down data compares to standard activity estimates. The Q&A segment for this presentation is definitely going to be interesting.
